productDisplayName: Carrera Men Sqaure dial strap Black Watches

Case diameter: 39 mm Case thickness: 9mm Dial shape: Square Stainless steel case, with leather strap Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Black busy dial with metallic numbers Three sub dials with stopwatch reading Chronograph for easy reading of time Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for scuba diving
